physical_activity_log.title: Physical Activity Log
physical_activity_log.hero_subtitle: Discover how exercise can upgrade your brain's operating system and build a lasting habit for better mental health.
physical_activity_log.track_subtitle: Log your daily activities and monitor your progress over time.
physical_activity_log.no_activities: No activities logged yet. Start tracking above!
physical_activity_log.benefits_subtitle: When you get your heart pumping, your brain makes some amazing changes. Think of it like upgrading your brain's operating system.
physical_activity_log.benefits_intro: Right away, your body releases natural mood boosters:
physical_activity_log.endorphins_desc: Helps reduce pain and boosts mood.
physical_activity_log.serotonin_desc: Improves emotional balance and promotes calm.
physical_activity_log.benefits_callout: Just 15 minutes of running can cut your risk of depression by 26%.
physical_activity_log.benefits_more: That's not all — there's even more happening behind the scenes:
physical_activity_log.memory_desc: Exercise increases blood flow to the brain, helping improve memory and cognitive function.
physical_activity_log.stress_desc: Physical activity lowers stress hormones and helps your nervous system reset.
